parameters.query:
INSERT INTO leads (name, phone, source, first_message, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.name }}',
  '{{ $json.phone }}',
  '{{ $json.source }}',
  '{{ $json.messageText.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE
  SET last_seen_at = NOW(),
      message_count = leads.message_count + 1
RETURNING id, phone, name, created_at, (xmax = 0) AS is_new;

body.text: =Ola, {{ $('Extract Lead Data').item.json.name }}! Recebemos seu contato e em breve um de nossos consultores vai entrar em contato. Obrigado!
